purpose: External reference package for Dust Pod OS architecture — all sensitive data scrubbed

company_os.description: Company-level rollup layer. One Pod. Reads 7 Team OS ledgers daily. Promotes only cross-functional exceptions. Posts to company Slack channel.

keyFiles.company-os/pulse/org-status-banner.json: Daily company state snapshot: RAG per CP, top exceptions, team-level RAG grid
keyFiles.company-os/pulse/priority-pulse.json: Per-priority rolling pulse with evidence and historical status log
keyFiles.company-os/pulse/os-contract-registry.js: Pod registry: all OS pods, their layers, and their canonical file paths
keyFiles.company-os/system/handoff-status.json: Engine config: wake-up schedule, last run, upstream channels, area lead
keyFiles.company-os/people/roster.json: Company-wide identity roster (name, role, team, site)

team_os.description: Team-level operating layer. 7 Pods (CS, Sales, SE, Marketing, Talent, People, Product). Each runs a daily agent that reads signals and writes a goals ledger.

commonFiles.pulse/goals-ledger.json: THE canonical Team OS file. Arrays: goals[], commitments[], asks[], decisions[], risks[]. Every item: base-os-item shape.
commonFiles.system/handoff-status.json: Engine config: wake-up schedule, fire count, last run metadata

teamSpecificFiles.sales-os/pulse/sales-command-center.json: Sales scorecard + RAG state + North Star
teamSpecificFiles.se-os/pulse/team-telemetry.json: SE scorecard: Engagement Scoping + Product Validation
teamSpecificFiles.product-os/pulse/command-center.json: Product command center: recent shipments + active commitments

personal_os.description: Individual-level operating layer. One Pod per person. Morning + evening engines.

keyFiles.personal-os/me/context/priorities.json: Quarter-level beacons with RAG and CP tag

schemas.contracts/base-os-item.schema.json: Universal base item. Required: id, type, text, state, source, evidence, firstSeen, lastTouched.
schemas.contracts/team-os-goals-ledger.schema.js: Team ledger envelope. Required: schemaVersion=2, pod, goals[], commitments[], asks[], decisions[], risks[]
schemas.contracts/company-commitment-router.sche: Company exception router. Promoted items only.
schemas.contracts/personal-os-team-signal.schema: Personal to Team signal bus with privacyBoundary
schemas.contracts/alignment.schema.json: CP tags + ownershipRoute + businessArea + craftArea + parentRefs
schemas.contracts/status.schema.json: state + rag + confidence + reason + lastSignalAt + quietDays
schemas.contracts/metric.schema.json: name + unit + current + target + baseline + percentToGoal + direction
schemas.contracts/recommended-action.schema.json: rank + actionScore + theRead + thePlay + taskAlignment + feedbackState

designPrinciples: Pod files are canonical state — frames display them, agents write them, Slack confirms them
CP tags (CP1–CP7) map all work to company priorities — enables automatic rollup
RAG at every level — Red items are exceptions; Company OS promotes only exceptions
Ownership routes classify promoted items: Business | Craft | Coaching | Company Decision
Freshness gates — every engine validates file timestamps before publishing
Privacy by layer — People/Talent are aggregate-only, Personal OS is private by default
Frames are display only — no business logic, no writes
